title: Insider Threat + SIEM Integration — Behavioral Correlation Pipeline
description: test_insider_threat.py, test_breach_detection_engine.py, and test_siem_integration_engine.py cluster together. The SIEM engine normalizes events from 4 source types but the event stream is not fed into the insider threat behavioral analytics engine. SIEM correlation alerts sit in their own DB without triggering insider threat risk score updates.
missing: SIEM → insider threat pipeline: on each SIEM alert ingestion, call insider_threat_engine.analyze_user_risk() for the associated user_id and update their behavioral risk score
Breach detection → SIEM alert: when breach_detection_engine flags an anomaly, auto-publish a SIEM event so it appears in all downstream correlation and SOC dashboards
Cross-engine correlation window: implement a 15-minute sliding window that groups SIEM events by user_id and fires an insider threat alert when N events of sensitive types occur within the window
